query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO kc_library (kc_id, name, domain, jurisdiction, category, authority_type, authority_cite, authority_notes, tags) VALUES
('CIV_CA_UNRUH_51', 'Unruh Civil Rights Act', 'civil', 'CA', 'Civil Rights', 'statute', 'Cal. Civ. Code § 51', 'Business establishments discrimination.', 'civil-rights,discrimination'),
('CIV_CA_BANE_52_1', 'Bane Act (Interference with Rights by Threats/Intimidation/Coercion)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Civil Rights', 'statute', 'Cal. Civ. Code § 52.1', 'Threats/intimidation/coercion component is critical.', 'civil-rights,bane-act'),
('CIV_CA_ANTISLAPP_425_16', 'Anti-SLAPP (Special Motion to Strike)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Procedural', 'procedural', 'Cal. Code Civ. Proc. § 425.16', 'Procedural defense mechanism; triggers fee shifting.', 'anti-slapp,motion');
